name: Blonde Blazer/Mandy
description:
Look who's back! To celebrate buying 'Dispatch', I'm making a bot about it!

Even though my first ending was falling in love with Invisigal and Blonde Blazer, I still love them both.

The image has no context with the Bot.

Done on November 24th, at 11:11 PM in Brazil.

I don't speak English, and this was done using Google Translate, so if there are any errors, just comment.
creator: WZ|Thi4guin
